review_text: The attorney was clearly competent but felt stretched thin. Response times were inconsistent over the four-month engagement.
owner_response: We hear you. We are actively reviewing workload distribution to ensure consistent responsiveness.

review_text: Mixed experience. Strong legal work but the intake process was slow and the onboarding felt disorganized.
The case resolved, which is what matters. I would have appreciated more explanation of the billing line items along the way.
Mediocre communication throughout. I had to call the office twice to get basic status updates that should have been proactive.
owner_response: We apologize for the gaps in communication. This has been raised with the team.

review_text: The legal advice was sound but the initial consultation felt rushed. Would appreciate more time with the attorney upfront.
Expected more regular updates given the complexity of the matter. The final outcome was acceptable.
Service was average. Some billing entries were unclear and I had to request a corrected invoice.
owner_response: We sincerely apologize for the billing confusion and have corrected the invoice. Thank you for flagging it.

review_text: Disappointed with the lack of responsiveness. Multiple emails went unanswered for over a week during a critical phase.
The attorney did not seem fully prepared for the mediation session. We had to provide reminders about key facts in our file.
owner_response: We take preparation standards seriously and this has been addressed internally. We apologize for the experience.

review_text: Fees were significantly higher than the initial estimate with no explanation provided. I felt blindsided at invoicing.
Communication completely broke down in the final month of our engagement. We learned about key developments from the other party.
owner_response: We sincerely apologize. This is not the standard we hold ourselves to and we are investigating what occurred.

review_text: The outcome was poor and I do not feel the representation was adequate for the complexity of the matter.
Slow, expensive, and difficult to reach. We expected more given the firm's reputation.
Staff at the front desk were dismissive during our initial visit. It set a poor tone for the entire engagement.
owner_response: We apologize for this experience. Front-of-house conduct is being reviewed and addressed.

review_text: The case took three months longer than projected with no explanation. The delay caused real hardship for our family.
I was overbilled by a significant amount and the firm was not forthcoming about correcting it until I escalated.
owner_response: We have issued a corrected invoice and a partial credit. We are sorry for the distress this caused.

review_text: My calls were not returned for two weeks. When I finally reached someone, they had no familiarity with my file.
The attorney we engaged left the firm mid-case and we were given no warning and no transition plan.
owner_response: We apologize for the disruption. A transition protocol has since been put in place to prevent this outcome.

review_text: Billing disputes were handled rudely. I felt like a burden rather than a client when I raised legitimate questions.
Missed a filing deadline that set our case back by months. The firm offered no explanation and no reduced fee.
owner_response: We sincerely apologize for this failure. Steps have been taken to prevent recurrence and we have discussed remediation.
